name: swap_prow_job_run_tests_and_outputs
description: Atomic table swap: drop FKs, rename old sequences and tables to _old, rename new sequences and tables to production names, rename indexes to match
query: ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_tests DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_run_id; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_test_outputs DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_prow_job_run_test_outputs_prow_job_run_test_id; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_tests_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests_old_id_seq; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_test_outputs_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs_old_id_seq; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_tests RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests_old; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_test_outputs RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs_old; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_tests_new_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests_id_seq; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs_id_seq; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_tests_new RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_test_outputs_new RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_run_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_prow_job_run_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_test_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_status; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_prow_job_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_test_id_status; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_old_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_prow_job_run_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_old_prow_job_run_test_id; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_prow_job_run_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_run_id; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_status; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_prow_job_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_id; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_test_id_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id_status; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_prow_job_run_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_prow_job_run_test_id;

name: swap_test_analysis_by_job_by_dates
description: Atomic table swap: rename old table to _old, rename new table to production name, rename indexes to match
query: ALTER TABLE test_analysis_by_job_by_dates RENAME TO test_analysis_by_job_by_dates_old; ALTER TABLE test_analysis_by_job_by_dates_new RENAME TO test_analysis_by_job_by_dates; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_test_analysis_test_release_date RENAME TO idx_test_analysis_old_test_release_date; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_test_analysis_name_and_job RENAME TO idx_test_analysis_old_name_and_job; ALTER INDEX idx_test_analysis_new_test_release_date RENAME TO idx_test_analysis_test_release_date; ALTER INDEX idx_test_analysis_new_name_and_job RENAME TO idx_test_analysis_name_and_job;
